prepared_text:
eClerx/SECD/SE/2021/084 
 
October 26, 2021 
 
BSE Limited 
Corporate Relationship Department,  
Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers, 
25th Floor, Dalal Street,  
Fort, Mumbai - 400 001 
National Stock Exchange of India Limited 
Exchange Plaza, Plot No. C/1, 
Block G, Bandra - Kurla Complex 
Bandra (East),  
Mumbai – 400 051 
 
Dear Sir/Madam, 
 
 
Sub: 
Intimation under Regulation 29 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure 
Requirements) Regulations, 2015 [“Listing Regulations”] 
 
Reg: 
Intimation of the Q2FY22 Board Meeting and earnings call  
 
Scrip Code:  
BSE - 532927 
 
 
NSE – ECLERX 
 
This is to inform you that a Meeting of Board of Directors of the Company will be held on Tuesday, 
November 2, 2021, inter-alia, to approve and take on record Unaudited Financial Results 
(Consolidated and Standalone) of the Company for the quarter and half year ended                                     
September 30, 2021. 
 
As informed vide our letter number eClerx/SECD/SE/2021/072 dated September 28, 2021, the trading 
window for dealing in securities of the Company was closed from October 1, 2021, and shall remain 
closed till 48 hours after the announcement of financial results on November 2, 2021. 
 
Further, the earnings call for the Unaudited Financial Results for the quarter and half year ended 
September 30, 2021 will be held on the next day of the Board meeting i.e. Wednesday,                                     
November 3, 2021 from 4.00 pm to 5.00 pm and the earnings call details as attached herewith, will 
also be available on the Company’s website www.eclerx.com. 
 
This is for your information and records. 
 
Thanking you, 
 
Yours faithfully 
For eClerx Services Limited 
 
 
 
Pratik Bhanushali 
Company Secretary & Compliance Officer 
F8538 
 
Encl: As above 
pratik.bha
nushali@e
clerx.com
Digitally signed by 
pratik.bhanushali@eclerx.com 
DN: 
cn=pratik.bhanushali@eclerx.com 
Date: 2021.10.26 20:22:24 +05'30'

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
eClerx Services Ltd. to announce Q2 FY22 results on November 2nd, 2021;  
Earnings Call to be held on November 3rd, 2021 at 4:00 PM (IST)  
 
Mumbai, October 26th, 2021: eClerx Services Ltd. (eCx), (BSE: 532927), (NSE: ECLERX), 
Business Process Management, Analytics and Automation services firm, will announce its 
second quarter and half year FY22 results on Tuesday, November 2nd, 2021. The earnings 
call for the results would be held on Wednesday, November 3rd, 2021 at 4:00 PM (IST). The 
earnings call details will also be available on the company’s website, www.eclerx.com   
 
The Details of Earnings Conference Call are: 
 
Date: November 3rd, 2021  
 
Time (IST): 4:00 PM – 5:00 PM 
 
Click Here to Register Zoom Webinar 
After registering, you will receive a confirmation email containing information about joining 
the webinar. 
 
Management Representation from eClerx Services Ltd. 
 
Mr. PD Mundhra, Executive Director 
Mr. Anjan Malik, Director 
Mr. Rohitash Gupta, Chief Financial Officer 
 
Participants are requested to log in 10 minutes prior to the start of scheduled call.  
 
About eClerx Services Ltd: 
 
eClerx provides business process management, automation and analytics services to a 
number of Fortune 2000 enterprises, including some of the world's leading financial services, 
communications, retail, fashion, media & entertainment, manufacturing, travel & leisure and 
technology companies. Incorporated in 2000, eClerx is today traded on both the Bombay and 
National Stock Exchanges of India. The firm employs about 13000 people across Australia, 
Canada, Germany, India, Italy, Netherlands, Philippines, Singapore, Thailand, UK and the USA. 
For more information, visit www.eclerx.com. 
 
For further information, please contact: 
 
Pratik Bhanushali 
eClerx Services 
Email: Pratik.Bhanushali@eclerx.com    
Asha Gupta 
Christensen Advisory, India  
Email: agupta@christensenir.com  
 
eClerx Services Limited  
Q2 FY22 Earnings Call Invite
